entries.title: Each term, recite from memory or read beautifully 1 Hymn, 1 Old Testament passage, 1 New Testament passage, 1 Psalm, and 1 Poem.
entries.label: Each term, recite from memory or read beautifully 1 Hymn, 1 Old Testament passage, 1 New Testament passage, 1 Psalm, and 1 Poem.
entries.content: Except for some Bible passages, recitation selections are shared with Grades 1-2.
